author: Aram Dovlatyan
name: McGilchrist Register Token
blurb: Causal cumulative mean + FiLM conditioning per block — a 'right hemisphere' global context signal inspired by McGilchrist's hemispheric asymmetry thesis. The running mean is a holistic document summary; FiLM projects it into per-dimension scale+shift to modulate each block output. Zero-initialized so training starts identical to SOTA. Non-record: artifact 16.86MB > 16MB limit due to untied lm_head addition; v4 removes that.
notes: Three runs to resolve bugs: (1) zstd fell back to zlib [fixed: pip install zstandard on pod cold start], (2) 2x batch tokens halved step count to 2304 [fixed: reverted to 786K], (3) untied embeddings inflated artifact by ~855KB [to fix in v4]. Final run: 4505 steps at 133ms/step, zstd-22 active, 24.9GB VRAM/GPU. Per-step mechanism works — artifact overage is untied lm_head, not the register mechanism.
